init.title: Renson Arean — configure
init.description: Adjust integration settings. The Modbus slave address must match the thermostat address configured in the RensonThermostat plugin (default: 41).

user.title: Set up Renson Arean
user.description: Enter the connection details for the OpenMotics gateway.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate
reauth_confirm.description: Enter the new password for the OpenMotics gateway.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the gateway. Check the IP address.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Check username and password.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the logs for more information.
